title: German Keto Sausage Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, using German sausage and topped with crunchy slaw and caramelized onions. Perfect for a keto diet.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Slaw
ingredients.notes: make sure to use a low-carb slaw recipe

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cook the German sausage for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
While the sausage is cooking, caramelize the onions by cooking them in a pan over medium heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Prepare the crunchy slaw according to your low-carb recipe.
Warm the tacos shells according to the package instructions.
Slice the cooked sausage and place it in the tacos shells.
Top with caramelized onions, crunchy slaw, and chopped cilantro.
Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste.
